testcase.name: TC002 - Add Timesheet details
testcase.system-out: Given user is on OrangeHRM login page.....................................passed When user enter username..................................................passed When user enter password..................................................passed When user click on Login button...........................................passed Then the user is logged in to the application.............................passed Given user is on Dashboard page...........................................passed When user navigates to Time -> Timesheets.................................passed Then ViewEmployeeTimesheet page is displayed..............................passed When User click on Timesheet option.......................................passed Then Timesheet dropdown list is displayed.................................passed When user select My Timesheets option from the Timesheet dropdown.........passed Then ViewMyTimesheet page is displayed....................................passed When User click on Edit button............................................passed Then EditTimesheet page is displayed......................................passed When User click on Cancel button..........................................passed Then My Timesheet page is displayed.......................................passed
